_comment: Dev-only install/distribution profile — repo-bound developer workflow (plan/implement/verify/release/github/maintain/piv) with no sales or personal-life surface. Excludes: all Sales Commands + Sales Skills and all Life Commands + Life Skills per global/INVENTORY.md's existing taxonomy. Kept IN as generic/meta or dual-use per the conservative rule: grill-me (design stress-testing), handoff (session tool), write-a-skill (meta, references this repo's install), toc-bbit-expert (constraint analysis beyond deals). Design skills (brand, design-system, docx-generator, pptx-generator) are shared by sales AND dev docs (e.g. release:docs, verify:qa HTML output) so they stay IN — conservative call per harness-hardening-backlog.md item 5. Consumed by both install.sh --profile dev (local filter, ignores pluginName/marketplaceName rename fields) and cc-mirror.sh --profile dev (public distribution, if ever published).
pluginDescription: Developer workflow toolkit — plan, implement, verify, and ship code with a stack-agnostic PIV loop
marketplaceDescription: Curated Command Center plugin for developer-only machines
